summary: Fourth rework successfully fixed the bug. Changed relativePath.startsWith('.pi') to startsWith('.pi/') which now correctly blocks files like .pi-notes.md in root while allowing files inside .pi/intents/ directory. Verified all 10 success criteria are satisfied: extension structure exists, skill file has compression rules, before_agent_start hook provides default activation, Ctrl+T hotkey toggles mode, /terse commands work, tool_call hook intercepts file writes with warnings, agent definitions reference terse, status badge implemented, 17 tests pass (13 original + 4 new before_agent_start tests), README documents everything. TypeScript compiles clean. No residue, no skipped tests, no bugs found. Implementation is complete.
